     1	import type { FC, ReactNode } from 'react'

     3	export interface DialogStackItemProps {
     4	  title?: ReactNode
     5	  description?: ReactNode
     6	  content: FC<{ dismiss: () => void }>
     7	  className?: string
     8	  portalClassName?: string
     9	  showCloseButton?: boolean
    10	  clickOutsideToDismiss?: boolean
    11	}
    12	
    13	export interface DialogStackItem extends DialogStackItemProps {
    14	  id: string
    15	}
    16	
    17	let stack: DialogStackItem[] = []
    18	let idCounter = 0
    19	const listeners = new Set<() => void>()
    20	
    21	function emit() {
    22	  for (const fn of listeners) fn()
    23	}
    24	
    25	export function subscribe(fn: () => void) {
    26	  listeners.add(fn)
    27	  return () => {
    28	    listeners.delete(fn)
    29	  }
    30	}
    31	
    32	export function getSnapshot(): DialogStackItem[] {
    33	  return stack
    34	}
    35	
    36	export function presentDialog(props: DialogStackItemProps): () => void {
    37	  const id = `dialog-${++idCounter}`
    38	  stack = [...stack, { ...props, id }]
    39	  emit()
    40	  return () => dismissDialog(id)
    41	}
    42	
    43	export function dismissDialog(id: string) {
    44	  stack = stack.filter((item) => item.id !== id)
    45	  emit()
    46	}
    47	
    48	export function dismissTopDialog() {
    49	  stack = stack.slice(0, -1)
    50	  emit()
    51	}
    52	
    53	export function dismissAllDialogs() {
    54	  stack = []
    55	  emit()
    56	}

     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { throttle } from 'es-toolkit'
     4	import { useEffect } from 'react'
     5	
     6	import {
     7	  setIsImmersiveReadingEnabled,
     8	  setIsMouseInMarkdown,
     9	  useIsFocusReading,
    10	  useMainMarkdownElement,
    11	} from '~/atoms/hooks/reading'
    12	
    13	export const ImmersiveReadingInteractionProvider = () => {
    14	  const isFocusReading = useIsFocusReading()
    15	  const mainMarkdownElement = useMainMarkdownElement()
    16	
    17	  // 鼠标移动检测（仅在 focusReading=true 时激活）
    18	  useEffect(() => {
    19	    if (!isFocusReading) {
    20	      setIsMouseInMarkdown(false)
    21	      setIsImmersiveReadingEnabled(false)
    22	      return
    23	    }
    24	
    25	    if (!mainMarkdownElement) {
    26	      setIsMouseInMarkdown(false)
    27	      setIsImmersiveReadingEnabled(false)
    28	      return
    29	    }
    30	
    31	    const handleMouseMove = throttle((e: MouseEvent) => {
    32	      const rect = mainMarkdownElement.getBoundingClientRect()
    33	      const isInside =
    34	        e.clientX >= rect.left &&
    35	        e.clientX <= rect.right &&
    36	        e.clientY >= rect.top &&
    37	        e.clientY <= rect.bottom
    38	
    39	      setIsMouseInMarkdown(isInside)
    40	      setIsImmersiveReadingEnabled(isInside)
    41	    }, 300)
    42	
    43	    document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove, { passive: true })
    44	
    45	    return () => {
    46	      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    47	    }
    48	  }, [isFocusReading, mainMarkdownElement])
    49	
    50	  return null
    51	}
```

    10	import { useRouter } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    11	import { SocketEmitEnum } from '~/types/events'
    12	
    13	import { socketWorker } from '../../socket/worker-client'
    14	
    15	if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    16	  import('../../socket/worker-client')
    17	}
    18	export const SocketContainer = () =>
    19	  useIsClient() ? <SocketContainerImpl /> : null
    20	const SocketContainerImpl: Component = () => {
    21	  const connectOnce = useRef(false)
    22	  const router = useRouter()
    23	  useEffect(() => {
    24	    if (connectOnce.current) return
    25	
    26	    socketWorker.setRouter(router)
    27	    connectOnce.current = true
    28	  }, [router])
    29	
    30	  const webSocketSessionId = useSocketSessionId()
    31	  const previousWebSocketSessionIdRef = useRef(webSocketSessionId)
    32	
    33	  const socketIsConnected = useSocketIsConnect()
    34	
    35	  useEffect(() => {
    36	    const previousWebSocketSessionId = previousWebSocketSessionIdRef.current
    37	    previousWebSocketSessionIdRef.current = webSocketSessionId
    38	    if (!socketIsConnected) return
    39	
    40	    socketWorker.emit(SocketEmitEnum.UpdateSid, {
    41	      sessionId: webSocketSessionId,
    42	    })
    43	
    44	    deleteActivityPresence(previousWebSocketSessionId)
    45	  }, [socketIsConnected, webSocketSessionId])
    46	
    47	  const locale = useLocale()
    48	  useEffect(() => {
    49	    if (!socketIsConnected) return
    50	    socketWorker.emit(SocketEmitEnum.UpdateLang, { lang: locale })
    51	  }, [socketIsConnected, locale])
    52	
    53	  const pageIsActive = usePageIsActive()
    54	  useEffect(() => {
    55	    if (pageIsActive && !socketIsConnected) {
    56	      socketWorker.reconnect()
    57	    }
    58	  }, [pageIsActive, socketIsConnected])
    59	
    60	  return null
    61	}

     8	function setupIo(config: {
     9	  url: string
    10	  socket_session_id: string
    11	  lang?: string
    12	}) {
    13	  if (ws) return
    14	  // 使用 socket.io

    17	  ws = io(config.url, {

    22	    transports: ['websocket'],
    23

    26	      ...(config.lang ? { lang: config.lang } : {}),

    33	      type: 'disconnect',
    34	    })

    36

    40	  ws.on('message', (payload) => {

    46	    })

    48

    51	
    52	    if (waitingEmitQueue.length > 0) {
    53	      waitingEmitQueue.forEach((payload) => {

    57	      waitingEmitQueue.length = 0

    12	export function DropdownMenu(props: DropdownMenuProps) {
    13	  return <MenuPrimitive.Root {...props} />
    14	}
    15	
    16	// -- Trigger --
    17	
    18	type DropdownMenuTriggerProps = ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Trigger>
    19	
    20	export function DropdownMenuTrigger(props: DropdownMenuTriggerProps) {
    21	  return <MenuPrimitive.Trigger {...props} />
    22	}
    23	
    24	// -- Portal --
    25	
    26	function DropdownMenuPortal({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
    27	  const { className } = usePortalTheme()
    28	  return (
    29	    <MenuPrimitive.Portal>
    30	      {className ? <div className={className}>{children}</div> : children}
    31	    </MenuPrimitive.Portal>
    32	  )
    33	}
    34	
    35	// -- Content (Portal + Positioner + Popup) --
    36	
    37	type DropdownMenuContentProps = Omit<
    38	  ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Popup>,
    39	  'render'
    40	> & {
    41	  align?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['align']
    42	  alignOffset?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['alignOffset']
    43	  side?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['side']
    44	  sideOffset?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['sideOffset']
    45	  className?: string
    46	  children?: ReactNode
    47	}
    48	
    49	export function DropdownMenuContent({
    50	  align = 'start',
    51	  alignOffset = 0,
    52	  side = 'bottom',
    53	  sideOffset = 4,
    54	  className,
    55	  children,
    56	  ...popupProps
    57	}: DropdownMenuContentProps) {
    58	  return (
    59	    <DropdownMenuPortal>
    60	      <MenuPrimitive.Positioner
    61	        align={align}
    62	        alignOffset={alignOffset}
    63	        side={side}
    64	        sideOffset={sideOffset}
    65	      >
    66	        <MenuPrimitive.Popup
    67	          className={`${css.popup}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
    68	          {...popupProps}
    69	        >
    70	          {children}
    71	        </MenuPrimitive.Popup>
    72	      </MenuPrimitive.Positioner>
    73	    </DropdownMenuPortal>
    74	  )
    75	}
    76	
    77	// -- Group --
